title: unsupported key 'Memory' in group 'Container' with podman rootless
body: ### Issue Description I wrote a .container file with a small httpd process for testing purpose. My current testing is regarding cgroups, my system only allows memory and pids and its working fine for other processes and if i am running e.g. `podman run -m=20m ...`. But when I tried it with podman, the quadlet-generator says `Memory` is a unsupported key. I also tried it rootfull with the same result. ### Steps to reproduce the issue Steps to reproduce the issue 1. add e.g. `Memory=200m` to any .container quadlet to the `[Container]` group 2. Copy the file to `$HOME.config/containers/systemd/` (rootless) or `/etc/containers/systemd/` rootfull 3. Execute systemctl daemon-reload ### Describe the results you received with quadlet, the following issue is logged in journalctl: ```bash Oct 16 08:35:44 axcf3152 systemd[2236]: Reloading requested from client PID 2512 ('systemctl')... Oct 16 08:35:44 axcf3152 systemd[2236]: Reloading... Oct 16 08:35:44 axcf3152 systemd[2516]: quadlet-generator[2516]: converting "hello-world.container": unsupported key 'Memory' in group 'Container' in /opt/plcnext/.config/containers/systemd/hello-world.contain> Oct 16 08:35:44 axcf3152 (sd-exec-strv)[2515]: /usr/lib/systemd/user-generators/podman-user-generator failed with exit status 1. Oct 16 08:35:45 axcf3152 systemd[2236]: Reloading finished in 558 ms. ``` no .service file gets generated and nothing starts. ### Describe the results you expected .service files should be generated and the container starts with the defined memory limitation. With podman run the positive example, how it should look like: ### podman info output ```yaml host: arch: amd64 buildahVersion: 1.39.4 cgroupControllers: - memory - pids cgroupManager: systemd cgroupVersion: v2 conmon: package: Unknown path: /usr/bin/conmon version: 'conmon version 2.1.13, commit: 82de887596ed8ee6d9b2ee85e4f167f307bb569b' cpuUtilization: idlePercent: 90.12 systemPercent: 3.1 userPercent: 6.78 cpus: 2 databaseBackend: sqlite distribution: codename: scarthgap distribution: pxc version: 2025.6.0 eventLogger: journald freeLocks: 2047 hostname: axcf3152 idMappings: gidmap: - container_id: 0 host_id: 1002 size: 1 - container_id: 1 host_id: 165536 size: 65536 uidmap: - container_id: 0 host_id: 1002 size: 1 - container_id: 1 host_id: 165536 size: 65536 kernel: 6.1.107-rt39-pxc linkmode: dynamic logDriver: journald memFree: 699703296 memTotal: 1915850752 networkBackend: netavark networkBackendInfo: backend: netavark dns: package: Unknown path: /usr/libexec/podman/aardvark-dns version: aardvark-dns 1.15.0 package: Unknown path: /usr/libexec/podman/netavark version: netavark 1.15.0 ociRuntime: name: crun package: Unknown path: /bin/crun version: |- crun version 1.21-dirty commit: 10269840aa07fb7e6b7e1acff6198692d8ff5c88 rundir: /run/user/1002/crun spec: 1.0.0 +SYSTEMD +SELINUX +APPARMOR +CAP +SECCOMP +EBPF +YAJL os: linux pasta: executable: /usr/bin/pasta package: Unknown version: "" remoteSocket: exists: true path: /run/user/1002/podman/podman.sock rootlessNetworkCmd: slirp4netns security: apparmorEnabled: false capabilities: CAP_CHOWN,CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE,CAP_FOWNER,CAP_FSETID,CAP_KILL,CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE,CAP_SETFCAP,CAP_SETGID,CAP_SETPCAP,CAP_SETUID,CAP_SYS_CHROOT rootless: true seccompEnabled: true seccompProfilePath: "" selinuxEnabled: false serviceIsRemote: false slirp4netns: executable: /usr/bin/slirp4netns package: Unknown version: |- slirp4netns version 1.2.0-beta.0+dev commit: unknown libslirp: 4.7.0 SLIRP_CONFIG_VERSION_MAX: 4 libseccomp: 2.5.5 swapFree: 0 swapTotal: 0 uptime: 1h 32m 13.00s (Approximately 0.04 days) variant: "" plugins: authorization: null log: - k8s-file - none - passthrough - journald network: - bridge - macvlan - ipvlan volume: - local registries: '*.docker.io': Blocked: false Insecure: false Location: "" MirrorByDigestOnly: false Mirrors: - Insecure: false Location: mirror.gcr.io PullFromMirror: "" - Insecure: false Location: quay.io/libpod PullFromMirror: "" Prefix: '*.docker.io' PullFromMirror: "" localhost:5000: Blocked: false Insecure: true Location: localhost:5000 MirrorByDigestOnly: false Mirrors: null Prefix: localhost:5000 PullFromMirror: "" store: configFile: /opt/plcnext/.config/containers/storage.conf containerStore: number: 1 paused: 0 running: 0 stopped: 1 graphDriverName: overlay graphOptions: {} graphRoot: /opt/plcnext/.local/share/containers/storage graphRootAllocated: 31250812928 graphRootUsed: 240869376 graphStatus: Backing Filesystem: overlayfs Native Overlay Diff: "false" Supports d_type: "true" Supports shifting: "true" Supports volatile: "true" Using metacopy: "false" imageCopyTmpDir: /opt/system/tmp imageStore: number: 2 runRoot: /run/user/1002/containers transientStore: false volumePath: /opt/plcnext/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes version: APIVersion: 5.4.2 Built: 1743601389 BuiltTime: Wed Apr 2 13:43:09 2025 GitCommit: be85287fcf4590961614ee37be65eeb315e5d9ff-dirty GoVersion: go1.22.12 Os: linux OsArch: linux/amd64 Version: 5.4.2 ``` ### Podman in a container No ### Privileged Or Rootless None ### Upstream Latest Release No ### Additional environment details Podman running on an embedded system with the latest yocto release. ### Additional information _No response_

comments.body: I found what I was searching for. The Memory key is first supported with podman version 5.5.
